mapper.sql: SELECT c.COLUMN_NAME, c.COLUMN_COMMENT, TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.COLUMN_COMMENT, '[', -1), ']', 1)) AS cd_kind FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c WHERE c.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND c.TABLE_NAME = 'CAM_HISTORY_C' AND c.COLUMN_COMMENT LIKE '%[%]%' ORDER BY c.ORDINAL_POSITION

SELECT c.COLUMN_NAME, TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.COLUMN_COMMENT, '[', -1), ']', 1)) AS cd_kind, x.CD, x.CD_NM, x.SHORT_NM, x.ORD_NO FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c JOIN XFRMD2C x ON x.CD_KIND = TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.COLUMN_COMMENT, '[', -1), ']', 1)) AND x.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' WHERE c.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND c.TABLE_NAME = 'CAM_HISTORY_C' AND c.COLUMN_COMMENT LIKE '%[%]%' ORDER BY c.ORDINAL_POSITION, CAST(x.ORD_NO AS UNSIGNED)

SELECT h.CAM_HISTORY_ID, h.EMP_ID, h.STA_YMD, h.YEARNUM, h.SEND_YN, h.REST_YN, h.REN_YMD, h.BABY_YMD, h.CON_YMD, h.DIS_YN, h.DIS_RTN_YMD, h.DIS_ORG_CD, h.DIS_POS_CD, h.DIS_DUTY_CD, h.DIS_POS_GRD_CD, h.JOB_CD, h.NOTE, h.OUT_NOTE, /* 코드 원값 */ h.TYPE_CD, h.CAU_CD, h.COMPANY_CD, h.ORG_CD, h.POS_CD, h.POS_GRD_CD, h.DUTY_CD, h.EMP_KIND_CD, h.DIS_KIND_CD, h.HIRE_CD, h.REASON_CD, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [CAM_TYPE_CD] */ COALESCE(xt.CD_NM, h.TYPE_CD) AS type_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [CAM_CAU_CD] */ COALESCE(xc.CD_NM, h.CAU_CD) AS cau_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_COMPANY_CD] */ COALESCE(xco.CD_NM, h.COMPANY_CD) AS company_nm, /* ORG_CD → ORM_ORG_C (COMMENT에 CD_KIND 없음, 별도 조직 테이블) */ COALESCE(o.ORG_NM, h.ORG_CD) AS org_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_POS_CD] */ COALESCE(xp.CD_NM, h.POS_CD) AS pos_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_POS_GRD_CD] */ COALESCE(xpg.CD_NM, h.POS_GRD_CD) AS pos_grd_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_CALL_CD] */ COALESCE(xd.CD_NM, h.DUTY_CD) AS duty_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_JOB_CD] */ COALESCE(xj.CD_NM, h.JOB_CD) AS job_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_EMP_KIND_CD] */ COALESCE(xek.CD_NM, h.EMP_KIND_CD) AS emp_kind_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [CAM_DIS_KIND_CD] */ COALESCE(xdk.CD_NM, h.DIS_KIND_CD) AS dis_kind_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [PHM_HIRE_CD] */ COALESCE(xhr.CD_NM, h.HIRE_CD) AS hire_nm, /* COLUMN_COMMENT [CAM_REASON_CD] */ COALESCE(xrs.CD_NM, h.REASON_CD) AS reason_nm, /* 사원 정보 */ e.EMP_NO, e.EMP_NM, e.CTZ_NO, COALESCE(wo.ORG_NM, e.WORK_ORG_CD) AS work_so_nm FROM CAM_HISTORY_C h JOIN PHM_EMP_C e ON h.EMP_ID = e.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C o ON h.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD AND o.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C wo ON e.WORK_ORG_CD = wo.ORG_CD AND wo.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' /* ── INFORMATION_SCHEMA COLUMN_COMMENT [CD_KIND] 기반 XFRMD2C 조인 ── */ LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xt ON h.TYPE_CD = xt.CD AND xt.CD_KIND = 'CAM_TYPE_CD' AND xt.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xc ON h.CAU_CD = xc.CD AND xc.CD_KIND = 'CAM_CAU_CD' AND xc.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xco ON h.COMPANY_CD = xco.CD AND xco.CD_KIND = 'PHM_COMPANY_CD' AND xco.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xp ON h.POS_CD = xp.CD AND xp.CD_KIND = 'PHM_POS_CD' AND xp.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xpg ON h.POS_GRD_CD = xpg.CD AND xpg.CD_KIND = 'PHM_POS_GRD_CD' AND xpg.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xd ON h.DUTY_CD = xd.CD AND xd.CD_KIND = 'PHM_CALL_CD' AND xd.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xj ON h.JOB_CD = xj.CD AND xj.CD_KIND = 'PHM_JOB_CD' AND xj.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xek ON h.EMP_KIND_CD = xek.CD AND xek.CD_KIND = 'PHM_EMP_KIND_CD' AND xek.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xdk ON h.DIS_KIND_CD = xdk.CD AND xdk.CD_KIND = 'CAM_DIS_KIND_CD' AND xdk.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xhr ON h.HIRE_CD = xhr.CD AND xhr.CD_KIND = 'PHM_HIRE_CD' AND xhr.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xrs ON h.REASON_CD = xrs.CD AND xrs.CD_KIND = 'CAM_REASON_CD' AND xrs.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' WHERE h.STA_YMD BETWEEN ? AND ?
